---
id: get-validation-attempt-stats
title: "Obtener estadísticas de intentos de validación"
description: "Obtiene métricas agregadas centradas en los intentos de validación, incluyendo éxito,"
sidebar_label: "Obtener estadísticas de intentos de validación"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/resources/soyio-api
custom_edit_url: null
show_extensions: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Obtener estadísticas de intentos de validación"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/validation_attempts/stats"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



<details>
<summary><strong>Permisos requeridos</strong></summary>

**Dashboard:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `disclosure.dashboard.read`
- `disclosure.dashboard.manage`
- `dsr.dashboard.read`
- `dsr.dashboard.manage`

**API Keys:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `validation_attempts.api.read`

</details>



Obtiene métricas agregadas centradas en los intentos de validación, incluyendo éxito,
tiempos, reintentos y distribuciones por plataforma, tipo de solicitud y perfil de validación.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"where","in":"query","description":"Filtros en formato JSON","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"timezone","in":"query","description":"Zona horaria usada para agrupar la serie diaria.","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"America/Santiago"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Estadísticas de intentos de validación","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"stats":{"type":"object","properties":{"summary":{"type":"object","properties":{"total_validations":{"type":"integer"},"successful_validations":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]},"average_validation_time_seconds":{"type":["number","null"]},"average_tries_until_success":{"type":["number","null"]},"nfc_validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]},"non_nfc_validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsSummary"},"time_series":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"bucket":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_failed":{"type":"integer"}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsTimeSeriesPoint"}},"browser_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"os_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"device_type_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"device_family_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"requestable_type_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"validation_profile_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"nfc_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"validation_total":{"type":"integer"},"validation_successful":{"type":"integer"},"validation_success_rate":{"type":["number","null"]}},"title":"ValidationAttemptStatsDistributionItem"}},"failure_distribution":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Item agregado para distribuciones y composiciones del dashboard.","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Clave de la categoría agregada.","example":"granted"},"count":{"type":"integer","description":"Cantidad agregada para la categoría.","example":12}},"title":"DashboardDistributionItem"}},"top_failure_details":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Item agregado para distribuciones y composiciones del dashboard.","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Clave de la categoría agregada.","example":"granted"},"count":{"type":"integer","description":"Cantidad agregada para la could not authenticate your credentials. Please check the documentation at https://docs.soyio.id"}}}}}}}}
>
